source: NIST Electron-Impact Cross Section Database (SRD 107), https://dx.doi.org/10.18434/T4KK5C

databases.name: NIST BEB (SRD 107)
databases.description: Total electron-impact ionization cross sections from the Binary-Encounter-Bethe (BEB) model. Kim, Rudd, et al.

databases.name: NIST BEB SDCS (SRD 107)
databases.description: Singly differential ionization cross sections dσ/dW for H, He, H2.

processes.label: NIST · BCl · e + BCl -> 2e + BCl+
processes.param_raw: BEB model; threshold (lowest orbital binding energy) = 10.2 eV
processes.comment: Boron monochloride (BCl). BEB-model total electron-impact ionization cross section. Source units eV / Angstrom^2 (converted to m^2).
